cold_email.notes: Draft only. No SMTP, no API send, no bulk, no sequence automation. Manual founder send after gates pass.

follow_up.notes: Draft only. Same constraints as cold email. References prior manual touch, never fake familiarity.

linkedin.notes: Manual draft only. No scraping, no bots, no auto-connect, no auto-message, no browser automation. Founder copies manually.

website_form.notes: Draft only. No auto-submit, no browser automation. A human copies and submits manually.

whatsapp.notes: Inbound / opt-in manual replies only. No cold outreach, no outbound automation. Any number without opt-in = no-go.

phone.notes: Manual only. No dialer, no auto-call.
